abstract: An introduction to all of Aseprite's most useful tools, and a quick peek at how to use them effectively. Aseprite truly is a very powerful pixel art editing tool, and I'm hoping to give beginners some insight into how to get started with it. Thanks for dropping by!
title: Everything You Need to Know About ASEPRITE | Pixel Art Fundamentals

abstract: This e-book is our biggest, most comprehensive 2D development guide, created for Unity developers and artists who want to make a commercial 2D game.
title: 2D game art, animation, and lighting for artists
